message:
bd-3bxhj.3.5: Canonicalize effects into deterministic command/subscription model

Adds effect_canonical module that transforms IR effects into FrankenTUI's
Elm-inspired execution model with three categories:

- Commands (one-shot): Network, DOM, Storage → Cmd::Task
- Subscriptions (continuous): Timer, EventListener, Process → Subscription<M>
- Fire-and-forget: Telemetry → synchronous, no message

Features:
- Trigger condition classification (OnMount, OnDependencyChange)
- Message protocol typing (DataResult, Tick, EventStream, Silent)
- Cleanup strategy mapping (SubscriptionStop, AbortInFlight, ExplicitAction)
- Async boundary classification (ThreadPool, DedicatedThread, Synchronous)
- Idempotency and determinism classification per effect kind
- Write→read ordering constraint inference for deterministic replay
- Topological execution ordering with deterministic tie-breaking
- Verification pass for replay determinism invariants
- Confidence-scored classification with rationale

26 tests passing, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
